primary_accessible_route.name: Weller Street Bridge Route
primary_accessible_route.description: Level, step-free pathway from Sound Transit Stadium Station to Lumen Field via Weller Street Bridge. Avoids Pioneer Square steep grades.
primary_accessible_route.avoid: Pioneer Square — steep grades and crowded walkways not suitable for wheelchair users

primary_accessible_route.name: NJ Transit Meadowlands Rail Accessible Route
primary_accessible_route.description: Accessible platform with gap ramps at Secaucus Junction. Covered walkway with tactile paving from rail platform to Gate A.
primary_accessible_route.avoid: General parking lots — long walking distances on uneven surfaces

primary_accessible_route.name: DART Shuttle Accessible Route
primary_accessible_route.description: Wheelchair-accessible climate-controlled shuttle from CentrePort/DFW Station. Shaded pathway with hydration stations to Gate D.
primary_accessible_route.avoid: Walking from general parking — extreme heat exposure risk

primary_accessible_route.name: MARTA Vine City Accessible Bridge
primary_accessible_route.description: Elevator access at Vine City Station. Level bridge with non-slip surface to Mercedes-Benz Stadium Gate 1.
primary_accessible_route.avoid: Centennial Olympic Park route — uneven surfaces in park area

primary_accessible_route.name: SkyTrain Stadium-Chinatown Accessible Route
primary_accessible_route.description: All SkyTrain stations have elevator access. Flat, wide pathway with tactile guiding strips from station to BC Place Gate A.

primary_accessible_route.name: FIFA Accessible Shuttle Route
primary_accessible_route.description: Wheelchair ramp-equipped shuttle from Tren Ligero stop to Estadio Azteca Gate B. Avoids uphill walk at 2,200m altitude.
primary_accessible_route.avoid: Walking uphill from Tren Ligero — shortness of breath risk at altitude

primary_accessible_route.name: TTC Streetcar Lakeside Accessible Route
primary_accessible_route.description: Low-floor streetcar with wheelchair ramp. Flat lakeside path to BMO Field entrance.
primary_accessible_route.avoid: Liberty Village shortcut — stairs not accessible

primary_accessible_route.name: FIFA Express Shuttle Accessible Route
primary_accessible_route.description: Climate-controlled accessible shuttle from Aventura Mall. Covered pathway to Gate G.
primary_accessible_route.avoid: General parking — long exposed walks in tropical heat

primary_accessible_route.name: FIFA Shuttle from Foxborough Station
primary_accessible_route.description: Wheelchair-accessible shuttle from MBTA Commuter Rail Foxborough station to Gillette Stadium.
primary_accessible_route.avoid: Walking from Foxborough station — distance and terrain challenging
